description: Source code for Express.js route handling file uploads, including validation, classification, extraction, and persistence of uploaded documents and text files.

methods.name: ensureLocalUploadsDir
methods.description: Creates the local uploads directory if it does not exist.

methods.name: safeBasename
methods.description: Sanitizes filename to prevent path traversal and invalid characters.

methods.name: isAllowedType
methods.description: Checks if a file's mimetype or extension is allowed.

methods.name: mapFiles
methods.description: Maps uploaded files to a simplified array with key properties.

methods.name: multerErrorToResponse
methods.description: Converts multer errors into API response objects.

methods.name: sha256Hex
methods.description: Computes SHA-256 hash of a buffer.

methods.name: resolveExplicitCategoryForFile
methods.description: Determines file category based on client-provided fields or JSON mappings.

methods.name: classifyCategoryFromExtractedText
methods.description: Heuristic classifier that infers document category from extracted text content.

methods.name: validateRequiredCategoriesFromClassification
methods.description: Ensures all required categories are present among uploaded files.

methods.name: writeUploadToLocalDisk
methods.description: Saves uploaded file buffer to local disk and returns the file path.

methods.name: persistOneMemoryFile
methods.description: Stores file metadata, extracts text, normalizes, and updates database records.

methods.name: validateAllFiles
methods.description: Validates all uploaded files for size and type, returning aggregated errors.

methods.name: handleMultiUpload
methods.description: Main handler for processing multipart uploads, including validation, classification, persistence, and response formatting.
